=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan 1992: US Fall Tour
13640 Gampel Pavillion ----- University Of Connecticut
Storrs, Connecticut
24 October 1992

Taper:  J.C., copy of LB3217

Disk 1
1. Everything Is Broken
2. Pretty Peggy-O (trad. arr. Bob Dylan)
3. All Along The Watchtower
4. She Belongs To Me
5. Shelter From The Storm
6. Under The Red Sky
7. Silvio (Bob Dylan & Robert Hunter)
8. Little Moses (Bert A. Williams/Earle C. Jones)
9. Boots Of Spanish Leather

Disk 2
1. Mr. Tambourine Man
2. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
3. Cat's In The Well
4. Queen Jane Approximately
5. The Times They Are A-Changin'
6. Maggie's Farm
7. What Good Am I?
8. Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35
9. It Ain't Me, Babe

Concert # 442 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 6 of the 1992 US Fall Tour. 1992 concert # 78.
Concert # 12 with the 8th Never-Ending Tour band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Bucky Baxt er (pedal steel guitar & electric
slide guitar), John Jackson (guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), Ian Wallace (drums), Winston Watson (drums & percussion).
8-10, 18 Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal).
11 Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal) & Tony Garnier (bass).
14 acoustic with the band.
3, 5, 9-11, 13, 17, 18 Bob Dylan harmonica.
14 Bucky Baxter (mandolin).
8 new songs (44%) compared to previous concert. 3 new songs for this tour.
Stereo audience recording, 120 minutes.
Session info updated 15 December 1992
